projects.title: Microservices Integration & Reliability
projects.summary: Engineered containerized software systems to ensure reliable operation across multiple environments.
projects.challenge: The organization required software systems to run reliably across diverse and isolated environments, including both field and offline settings.
projects.architecture: Implemented Docker containerization to standardize deployment environments. I collaborated closely with cybersecurity, network, and application teams to conduct rigorous microservices integration testing, ensuring all services functioned securely and as intended.
projects.outcome: Achieved consistent operation in field settings. I also guided a 10-member team through a technical presentation and created comprehensive documentation to support future system updates, ongoing maintenance, and issue resolution.

projects.title: Enterprise QA & Database Management
projects.summary: Executed complex SQL queries and comprehensive regression testing to ensure seamless website deployments.
projects.challenge: A major platform serving 10,000+ monthly users needed rigorous quality assurance to ensure seamless deployments and maintain database integrity across testing milestones.
projects.architecture: Partnered with cross-functional teams to execute complex SQL queries and conduct comprehensive regression testing. I coordinated reporting schedules and milestones directly with Cisco and Accenture stakeholders.
projects.outcome: Ensured timely project delivery without critical post-launch defects. Additionally, I proposed an innovative VR-based educational tool during a sustainability capstone project.

projects.title: Full-Stack Migration & UX Optimization
projects.summary: Led the architectural migration of a legacy Webflow site to a modern full-stack framework.
projects.challenge: The client needed to migrate from a limited Webflow site to a scalable full-stack architecture while simultaneously improving user conversion rates and traffic.
projects.architecture: Led the migration process, defining phases and deliverables for timely completion. I analyzed engagement metrics using Google Analytics to inform data-driven UX improvements.
projects.outcome: Successfully deployed the new architecture, resulting in a 15% increase in customer appointments and a 10% increase in overall site traffic.

projects.title: Threat Hunting & Anomaly Detection
projects.summary: Completed an immersive program focused on security operations, log analysis, and incident response.
projects.challenge: Developing a robust foundation in security operations, specifically focusing on identifying system anomalies and executing rapid incident response protocols.
projects.architecture: Utilized Splunk Catalyst and Wireshark to conduct deep log analysis, intrusion detection, and threat hunting within simulated, high-stakes environments.
projects.outcome: Built detailed case study reports identifying critical anomalies in system performance, significantly strengthening my investigative documentation and decision-making skills.
